title: Aurora Cannabis (US) (ACB) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: TipRanks analyst consensus for Aurora Cannabis provides detailed forward-looking analysis based on institutional research. Analyst consensus: According to projections from 5 analysts, average 12-month price target for Aurora Cannabis is $7.62 CAD, with high estimate of $10 CAD and low estimate of $5 CAD. Potential upside: Aurora Cannabis has potential upside of approximately 69.52% based on analysts' average price target. Rating distribution: Consensus includes Buy, Hold and Sell recommendations with specific weighting based on individual analyst assessments. Key themes: Analysts emphasize potential for Aurora to capitalize on medical cannabis market growth, particularly in international regulated markets. Manufacturing certifications (EU GMP, TGA) viewed as competitive advantage enabling revenue expansion. Financial metrics: Analysts tracking adjusted EBITDA trajectory and free cash flow generation as key value metrics. Management execution on cost control and margin expansion seen as critical to valuation upside. Profitability inflection: Analysts examining path to full GAAP profitability, currently masked by accounting non-cash charges and integration costs. Sentiment: Overall analyst sentiment cautiously optimistic with emphasis on execution risk and regulatory uncertainty. Valuation appears attractive for risk-tolerant investors focused on long-term medical cannabis market growth opportunity.
